inputs.string_a:
Use the uploaded photo as reference. Create a luxury monochrome engraved sketch in pure white on a solid black background. Remove the original background completely.
Preserve the exact facial features, proportions, pose, hairstyle, and clothing silhouette. Render the subjects with crisp ultra-fine white contour lines, slightly stronger on key edges such as the jawline, nose bridge, eyelids, lips, fingers, hair outline, collar, and fabric folds.
Build the form with a balanced combination of clean engraved line shading, fine directional sketch strokes, and controlled white stippling. Do not rely only on dots. Use clear white linework across the face, hair, hands, and clothing so the subject reads clearly and has strong three-dimensional volume. Keep broader brighter highlight areas on the forehead, cheeks, nose, hands, and hair, while using deep black shadows for contrast without muddy or empty black patches inside the figure.
Keep the artwork fully contained inside the black canvas, with comfortable black margin on all sides so the subject sits close to the edges but is never cropped or touching the frame.
Style: sharp, elegant, high-contrast, clean etched portraiture.
Avoid: blur, gray wash, painterly texture, messy noise, muddy stippling, heavy cross-hatching, weak contrast, cropped edges.
